headline: Junior counselors help younger volunteers grow into the service culture of camp
subheadline: Junior counselor roles create an entry point for younger volunteers who want to serve, learn, and contribute to the camp community in a meaningful way.

sections.title: Learn the rhythm of camp
sections.description: Junior counselors gain exposure to the responsibility, joy, and teamwork that make Camp Dream GA distinctive.

sections.title: Support the larger team
sections.description: The role strengthens the counselor community while helping younger volunteers serve in age-appropriate ways.

sections.title: Build a long-term volunteer culture
sections.description: Junior counselor service can help develop future counselors and long-term community leaders.

cta.heading: Use the volunteer overview and contact page to learn whether the junior counselor role is the right match.
cta.body: Camp Dream GA uses service pathways that let people grow into the mission over time.
